reason: Install-aware followthrough is clear: install receipts, weekly governor truth, and promoted public proof all agree.
registry_milestone_title: Install-aware release, support, and public concierge
registry_exit_criteria: Fix confirmation, release explainer, and support closure bundles compile from install-aware channel and support truth instead of queued support state alone.

Public trust surfaces such as downloads, release, and help-entry pages may offer bounded concierge routing with first-party fallbacks, while authenticated and truth-bearing surfaces remain first-party only.
Help, support, status, and release surfaces can answer what changed, what to do next, and why this build, channel, or action is correct for this user.
Mail, in-product notices, public trust surfaces, and the public proof shelf all cite the same install-aware release and recovery receipts.
